WORKER_URL.description: Module worker entrypoint used by the main-thread runtime.

SERVICE_WORKER_URL.description: Service worker entrypoint registered after the app reaches full readiness.

PROGRESSIVE_TRACE_RENDERER_URL.description: Deferred progressive trace renderer implementation module URL, relative to host/runtime.mjs.

WASM_MODULES_URL.description: Deferred generated wasm module graph URL, relative to host/runtime.mjs.

BOOTSTRAP_MEMORY_INITIAL_PAGES.description: Initial WebAssembly memory pages allocated by the bootstrap module.

BOOTSTRAP_MEMORY_MAXIMUM_PAGES.description: Maximum WebAssembly memory pages allowed by the bootstrap module.

duplicateNumericValues.description: Cold full-load readiness and the default renderer query time window are intentionally distinct budgets that happen to share a value.
Warm-load budget fields share the same target value, but each measures a separate browser/cache path boundary and may move independently.

Warm HTTP cache and warm service-worker paths both require no protected-path network transfer, while the renderer planner end tag, command tag offset, and incomplete-range start offset are separate renderer ABI values.

These renderer constants and the interactive ingest async poll cadence are intentionally distinct: viewport clamp span, Wasm query-range tag, planner terminator budget, canvas stroke width, command-stream style role values, and handoff polling cadence.
The incomplete-query planner tag, RGB style-kind tag, and default-slice style role share a value but occupy distinct command-stream fields.
The fill-rect command tag, partial-slice style role, and lane gap are separate renderer contracts that happen to share a value.
Reader cache slots, stroke-line command tag, command style-kind offset, partial-hatch style role, and incomplete-range end offset are unrelated contracts with the same numeric value.
The clear-rect command tag and unknown-fill style role live in separate command-stream fields.
Band padding, unknown-range stripe spacing, command style-value offset, incomplete-stripe style role, and incomplete-range track-id offset are distinct renderer contracts.
The command x-field offset and incomplete-range record width are separate renderer ABI values.
Hatch-rect command tag, hex color width, partial-slice hatch spacing, and unknown-stripe style role are unrelated renderer values that happen to match today.
Lane height and incomplete-query stripe spacing are separate visual defaults and may move independently.
The ingest source-name pointer/capacity and renderer row/range caps are separate scratch-memory and command-buffer contracts.
The reader-name scratch pointer and renderer command cap are separate runtime contracts that happen to share a value.
The main-thread reader query cap and progressive renderer query cap both limit rows today, but they belong to separate call-site contracts.

DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_PTR.description: Default memory pointer for host-written ingest source names; this is a scratch-memory address, not the source-name capacity.

DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum encoded byte length for host-written ingest source names; intentionally distinct from DEFAULT_INGEST_NAME_PTR even while both values are 4096.

DEFAULT_READER_NAME_PTR.description: Default memory pointer for main-thread reader index names; starts after the ingest-name scratch buffer.

DEFAULT_READER_CACHE_SLOTS.description: Default number of main-thread index reader cache slots.

DEFAULT_READER_QUERY_ROW_CAP.description: Default row cap for main-thread index reader queries.

DEFAULT_INGEST_PROGRESS_WINDOW_MS.description: Default worker ingest throughput sample window used for progress and ETA calculation.

DEFAULT_INGEST_ETA_STABLE_MS.description: Minimum worker ingest progress sample age before ETA is surfaced to avoid first-ramp flicker.

FIXTURE_SIZE_BYTES.description: Size of the throttled trace fixture used by the interactive ingest verification gate.

INGEST_WINDOW_BYTES.description: Expected bytes covered by the mock-throttled ingest window in the interactive ingest verification gate.

FRAME_BUDGET_MS.description: 60 fps pan/zoom frame budget enforced by the interactive ingest verification gate.

ASYNC_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum time the interactive ingest verification gate waits for async production handoff state before failing loudly.

ASYNC_POLL_INTERVAL_MS.description: Polling cadence for async production handoff checks in the interactive ingest verification gate.

errors.APP_LOAD_FAILED: tracy failed to load the WebAssembly viewer.
errors.JSPI_UNAVAILABLE: tracy needs a browser with WebAssembly JavaScript Promise Integration (JSPI) enabled.
errors.MAIN_THREAD_INDEX_READER_NOT_READY: main-thread index reader is not ready
errors.OPFS_SOURCE_DID_NOT_REPORT_VALID_NAME_SU: did not report a valid name
errors.OPFS_SOURCE_NAME_TOO_LONG_PREFIX: OPFS source name is too long:
errors.SLICE_CATALOG_FULL_PREFIX: main-thread slice catalog full while rebuilding index

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_OUT_PTR.description: Default scratch pointer for index query result rows decoded by the progressive trace renderer.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_WINDOW.description: Default minimum time span for one progressive trace renderer query tile.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_ROW_CAP.description: Default maximum index query rows decoded from one progressive trace renderer query.

DEFAULT_TRACE_QUERY_RANGE_BUDGET.description: Default maximum number of index query ranges the renderer may issue per draw.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_ROW_PTR.description: Default scratch pointer for rows handed to the Wasm trace render command emitter.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_ROW_CAP.description: Default maximum rows handed to the Wasm trace render command emitter.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_INCOMPLETE_RANGE_PT.description: Default scratch pointer for incomplete query ranges handed to the Wasm trace render command emitter.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_INCOMPLETE_RANGE_CA.description: Default maximum incomplete ranges handed to the Wasm trace render command emitter.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_COMMAND_PTR.description: Default scratch pointer for the Wasm trace render command buffer.

DEFAULT_TRACE_RENDER_COMMAND_CAP.description: Default maximum Wasm trace render commands emitted per frame.

BYTES.description: Byte length of one incomplete query range handed to the Wasm trace render command emitter.

START.description: Incomplete query range byte offset of the start timestamp.

END.description: Incomplete query range byte offset of the end timestamp.

TRACK_ID.description: Incomplete query range byte offset of the track id.

DEFAULT_MIN_VIEWPORT_SPAN.description: Minimum visible time span after pan/zoom clamping.

DEFAULT_UNKNOWN_AFFORDANCE_WIDTH.description: Default width in CSS pixels for the unknown leading-edge progress affordance.

DEFAULT_UNKNOWN_STRIPE_SPACING.description: Default stripe spacing in CSS pixels for the unknown leading-edge progress affordance.

DEFAULT_INCOMPLETE_QUERY_STRIPE_SPACING.description: Default stripe spacing in CSS pixels for incomplete query affordances.

END_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner sentinel tag indicating no more canvas operations.

QUERY_RANGE_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner tag for an index query-range canvas operation.

INCOMPLETE_QUERY_RANGE_TAG.description: Wasm trace renderer planner tag for a visible incomplete query-range affordance.

DRAW_FILL_RECT_TAG.description: Wasm trace render command tag for a Canvas2D fillRect operation.

DRAW_STROKE_LINE_TAG.description: Wasm trace render command tag for a Canvas2D stroked line operation.

DRAW_CLEAR_RECT_TAG.description: Wasm trace render command tag for a Canvas2D clearRect operation.

DRAW_HATCH_RECT_TAG.description: Wasm trace render command tag for filling a rectangular hatch visual.

TERMINATOR_OP_BUDGET.description: Extra planner iteration budget reserved for the required terminating canvas operation.

DRAW_COMMAND_BYTES.description: Byte length of one Wasm trace render command.

DRAW_COMMAND_TAG_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of the operation tag.

DRAW_COMMAND_STYLE_KIND_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of the style kind.

DRAW_COMMAND_STYLE_VALUE_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of the style value.

DRAW_COMMAND_X_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of x or x1.

DRAW_COMMAND_Y_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of y or y1.

DRAW_COMMAND_WIDTH_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of width.

DRAW_COMMAND_HEIGHT_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of height.

DRAW_COMMAND_X2_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of x2.

DRAW_COMMAND_Y2_OFFSET.description: Trace render command byte offset of y2.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_KIND.description: Trace render command style kind for a generated semantic color role.

DRAW_STYLE_RGB_KIND.description: Trace render command style kind for a packed row RGB color.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_BACKGROUND.description: Trace render command color role for the trace background.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_DEFAULT_SLICE.description: Trace render command color role for rows without a resolved packed color.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_PARTIAL_SLICE.description: Trace render command color role for partial rows while ingest is active.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_PARTIAL_HATCH.description: Trace render command color role for partial-row hatch strokes.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_UNKNOWN_FILL.description: Trace render command color role for unknown-range fill.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_UNKNOWN_STRIPE.description: Trace render command color role for unknown-range stripes.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_INCOMPLETE_FILL.description: Trace render command color role for incomplete-query fill.

DRAW_STYLE_ROLE_INCOMPLETE_STRIPE.description: Trace render command color role for incomplete-query stripes.

DEFAULT_CANVAS_WIDTH.description: Fallback canvas width used by the trace renderer when the browser has not reported dimensions.

DEFAULT_CANVAS_HEIGHT.description: Fallback canvas height used by the trace renderer when the browser has not reported dimensions.

DEFAULT_LANE_HEIGHT.description: Default slice lane height in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_LANE_GAP.description: Default vertical gap between slice lanes in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_TRACE_TOP.description: Default top offset for the first slice lane in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_BAND_PADDING.description: Default bottom padding for the rendered trace band in CSS pixels.

DEFAULT_PARTIAL_HATCH_SPACING.description: Default hatch spacing in CSS pixels for partial slice affordances.

DEFAULT_STROKE_WIDTH.description: Default line width for trace renderer affordance strokes.

WHEEL_DELTA_MIN.description: Minimum wheel delta used by trace viewport zoom clamping.

WHEEL_DELTA_MAX.description: Maximum wheel delta used by trace viewport zoom clamping.

WHEEL_DELTA_SCALE.description: Scale factor applied to clamped wheel deltas before exponential zoom.

RGB_COLOR_MASK.description: Mask for converting packed slice colors to six-digit CSS RGB hex values.

RGB_HEX_WIDTH.description: Minimum hex digit count for packed slice colors rendered as CSS RGB values.
